fields.name: Description
fields.default: Your clients edit content through simple forms. They never see code. They can't break your design.

default.title: Live preview
default.body: Edit a field, see it update instantly.

default.title: Design protection
default.body: You define the fields. That's the editing interface. No rogue font changes.

default.title: Drag-and-drop
default.body: Add blocks, reorder, publish. The page builder clients actually use.
